title: Restructure superrepo around compiler submodule

source.subject: Remove CI/CD pipeline and Cargo workspace; restructure repository to use compiler submodule

body:
Restructures the **beskid** superrepo to consume the compiler as a **git submodule**, removing the root Cargo workspace and in-tree CI that moved to `compiler`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`6fae27a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6fae27a)
- **Subject:** Remove CI/CD pipeline and Cargo workspace; restructure repository to use compiler submodule
- **Completed:** 2026-03-05

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`

## Relation
Complements **compiler-initial-commit** on the same day (2026-03-05): superrepo layout follows standalone compiler repo creation.
